title: zephyranthes riojana
intro: Zephyranthes riojana, also known as the Rio Zephyr Lily, is a species of flowering plant in the family Amaryllidaceae. It is a bulbous perennial that produces white or pink flowers, often used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant contains alkaloids such as zephyranthine, which have been found to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, providing health benefits for various conditions. Zephyranthes riojana can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture to leverage its medicinal properties.
